entries.title: Corebound economy base interactions validated
entries.summary: Wrote QA expectations before implementation review, validated the Corebound economy/base-interaction work against the task and prompt, and confirmed the required economy test command passes. The affordability checks now encode explicit deterministic minute assumptions and prove the 8-minute and 15-minute targets.

fields.Summary: Wrote QA expectations before implementation review, validated the Corebound economy/base-interaction work against the task and prompt, and confirmed the required economy test command passes. The affordability checks now encode explicit deterministic minute assumptions and prove the 8-minute and 15-minute targets.
fields.Commands: `sed -n '1,220p' agents/entrypoints/_check.md`; `sed -n '1,220p' agents/outline.md`; `sed -n '1,220p' agents/work/task.md`; `sed -n '1,240p' agents/work/quickfix.md`; `sed -n '1,220p' agents/roles/rubric-maker.md`; `sed -n '1,220p' agents/work/expectations.md`; `sed -n '1,260p' agents/historylog.md`; `git status --short`; `git diff -- agents/work/expectations.md corebound/src/simulation/economy.ts corebound/src/simulation/upgrades.ts corebound/src/content/tuning.ts corebound/tests/economy.test.ts`; `sed -n '1,260p' corebound/src/simulation/economy.ts`; `sed -n '1,260p' corebound/src/simulation/upgrades.ts`; `sed -n '1,260p' corebound/src/content/tuning.ts`; `sed -n '1,260p' corebound/tests/economy.test.ts`; `git -C corebound status --short`; `git -C corebound diff -- src/simulation/economy.ts src/simulation/upgrades.ts src/content/tuning.ts tests/economy.test.ts`; `sed -n '1,220p' agents/roles/tester.md`; `sed -n '1,220p' agents/roles/historian.md`; `npm test tests/economy.test.ts` (pass); `sed -n '1,240p' agents/work/prompts/001-corebound-economy-base-interactions.md`; `nl -ba corebound/src/simulation/economy.ts | sed -n '1,240p'`; `nl -ba corebound/src/simulation/upgrades.ts | sed -n '1,220p'`; `nl -ba corebound/src/content/tuning.ts | sed -n '1,220p'`; `nl -ba corebound/tests/economy.test.ts | sed -n '1,240p'`; `rg -n "R9|R10|R11|R12|R13|R21|8 min|15 min|afford" agents/work/task.md agents/work/prompts/001-corebound-economy-base-interactions.md agents/ideas/specs/corebound-spec-03-07-26-04.md -S`; `sed -n '1,220p' corebound/src/content/ores.ts`; `rg -n "ORE_TUNING|DRILL_RESISTANCE|ECONOMY_TUNING|SESSION_TARGET_TUNING|UPGRADE_TUNING|UPGRADE_STAT_INCREMENTS|BASE_UPGRADE_STATS" corebound/src corebound/tests -S`; `rg -n "sellValue: 12|sellValue: 28|sellValue: 55|sellValue: 96|fuelPricePerUnit|repairPricePerPoint|starterCopperTripMinutes" corebound/src corebound/tests -S`; `date '+%Y-%m-%d %H:%M'`
fields.Decisions: Marked QA as complete because the scoped behavior is implemented, tuning is centralized in content modules, and the prescribed verification command produced passing evidence. Because `corebound/` is a nested repo with untracked files from the turnloop root perspective, QA relied on direct file inspection plus `git -C corebound status --short` rather than root diff output for change attribution.

entries.title: Corebound Economy Time-Target Coverage
entries.summary: Made the starter economy assumptions explicit by adding shared session target tuning and updating the affordability tests to prove the first and second upgrade targets by elapsed minutes instead of raw trip counts. Also aligned economy state initialization with the centralized starting fuel and hull tuning values, and resolved the open quickfix item.

fields.Summary: Made the starter economy assumptions explicit by adding shared session target tuning and updating the affordability tests to prove the first and second upgrade targets by elapsed minutes instead of raw trip counts. Also aligned economy state initialization with the centralized starting fuel and hull tuning values, and resolved the open quickfix item.

entries.title: Corebound economy affordability evidence gap
entries.summary: Wrote QA expectations, inspected the Corebound economy implementation, and ran the required verification command. `cd corebound && npm test tests/economy.test.ts` passed, but QA found the affordability coverage incomplete because the tests assert credits after two or three hauling loops without encoding why those loops equal 8 or 15 minutes.

fields.Summary: Wrote QA expectations, inspected the Corebound economy implementation, and ran the required verification command. `cd corebound && npm test tests/economy.test.ts` passed, but QA found the affordability coverage incomplete because the tests assert credits after two or three hauling loops without encoding why those loops equal 8 or 15 minutes.
fields.Commands: sed -n '1,220p' agents/entrypoints/_check.md; sed -n '1,220p' agents/outline.md; sed -n '1,260p' agents/work/task.md; sed -n '1,260p' agents/work/quickfix.md; sed -n '1,240p' agents/roles/rubric-maker.md; sed -n '1,240p' agents/work/expectations.md; sed -n '1,260p' agents/historylog.md; git status --short; git -C corebound status --short; git -C corebound diff -- src/simulation/economy.ts src/simulation/upgrades.ts src/content/tuning.ts tests/economy.test.ts src/content/index.ts src/simulation/index.ts src/simulation/vehicle.ts; sed -n '1,260p' corebound/src/simulation/economy.ts; sed -n '1,260p' corebound/src/simulation/upgrades.ts; sed -n '1,260p' corebound/src/content/tuning.ts; sed -n '1,320p' corebound/tests/economy.test.ts; sed -n '1,220p' corebound/src/content/index.ts; sed -n '1,220p' corebound/src/simulation/index.ts; sed -n '1,260p' corebound/src/simulation/vehicle.ts; sed -n '1,260p' agents/roles/tester.md; sed -n '1,240p' agents/roles/historian.md; sed -n '1,220p' agents/roles/double-check.md; rg -n "getUpgradeStats|purchaseUpgrade|refuelAtBase|repairAtBase|sellCargo|createEconomyState|ECONOMY_TUNING|UPGRADE_TUNING|DRILL_RESISTANCE" corebound/src corebound/tests; npm test tests/economy.test.ts; sed -n '1,240p' agents/work/prompts/001-corebound-economy-base-interactions.md; rg -n "R9|R10|R11|R12|R13|R21|8 min|15 min|afford" agents/ideas/specs/corebound-spec-03-07-26-04.md agents/work/task.md agents/work/prompts/001-corebound-economy-base-interactions.md -S; rg -n "minute|min|trip|tutorial|guided" corebound/src corebound/tests -S; nl -ba corebound/tests/economy.test.ts | sed -n '1,220p'; nl -ba corebound/src/simulation/vehicle.ts | sed -n '40,70p'; rg -n "OPEN|Impact|Required fix|Verification" agents/work/quickfix.md agents/historylog.md agents -S; nl -ba agents/work/prompts/001-corebound-economy-base-interactions.md | sed -n '12,38p'; date '+%Y-%m-%d %H:%M'
fields.Decisions: Marked this run as `QUICKFIX_NEEDED` because the prompt requires affordability tests to explicitly demonstrate the 8-minute and 15-minute targets under deterministic assumptions, and the current tests do not encode any time model. No double-check role was needed because `agents/work/quickfix.md` had no OPEN items at the start of the run.

entries.title: Corebound economy base interactions and upgrade tuning
entries.summary: Added a data-driven first-pass economy for Corebound with cargo selling, base refuel/repair services, four upgrade categories, escalating upgrade costs, and deterministic affordability tests for the first-session pacing targets. Refactor was a no-op because the required and full-suite test runs passed without exposing any evidence-backed follow-up changes; `agents/work/quickfix.md` had no OPEN items.

fields.Decisions: Centralized ore values, drill timings, economy prices, and upgrade tuning in `corebound/src/content/tuning.ts` so the new economy modules and existing gameplay code read from one source of truth instead of duplicating constants. Kept the implementation pure-function based and limited to the economy/task scope without adding HUD or hazard systems.

entries.title: Validated Corebound seeded world generation pass
entries.summary: Validated the Corebound seeded world-generation task against explicit QA expectations and found the required behavior present: deterministic seeded layouts, query-parameter seed overrides, four depth-banded ore tiers, a visible surface opening with a clear descent path, guaranteed early sellable ore placement, and generated-world tile removal. The required verification command passed, and an additional disposable bundled simulation check confirmed the guaranteed opening ore lane was reachable from spawn within 20 seconds across sampled seeds 0 through 23.

fields.Summary: Validated the Corebound seeded world-generation task against explicit QA expectations and found the required behavior present: deterministic seeded layouts, query-parameter seed overrides, four depth-banded ore tiers, a visible surface opening with a clear descent path, guaranteed early sellable ore placement, and generated-world tile removal. The required verification command passed, and an additional disposable bundled simulation check confirmed the guaranteed opening ore lane was reachable from spawn within 20 seconds across sampled seeds 0 through 23.

fields.Decisions: Accepted the task as complete because the required automated verification passed and the only potentially indirect requirement, the 20-second opening ore reachability guarantee, was supported by an additional movement-simulation probe rather than assumption alone. Quickfix handling was not needed because agents/work/quickfix.md contained no OPEN items.

entries.title: Corebound seeded world generation pass
entries.summary: Added deterministic seeded world generation for Corebound with query-parameter seed overrides, four ore tiers, a visible surface opening and clear descent path, a guaranteed early sellable ore node, and generated-world tile removal via drilling. Added focused world tests covering determinism, opening-path guarantees, seed override behavior, and drilling updates. Refactor scan was a no-op because the required verification passed and no evidence-backed follow-up changes were indicated; `agents/work/quickfix.md` had no OPEN items.

fields.Summary: Added deterministic seeded world generation for Corebound with query-parameter seed overrides, four ore tiers, a visible surface opening and clear descent path, a guaranteed early sellable ore node, and generated-world tile removal via drilling. Added focused world tests covering determinism, opening-path guarantees, seed override behavior, and drilling updates. Refactor scan was a no-op because the required verification passed and no evidence-backed follow-up changes were indicated; `agents/work/quickfix.md` had no OPEN items.

entries.title: Validated Corebound foundation simulation pass
entries.summary: Validated the Corebound foundation task against explicit QA expectations and found the required behavior present: React/Vite/TypeScript scaffolding, fixed-timestep simulation, vehicle movement with collision and drilling logic, and targeted physics coverage. Verification commands passed, Vite reported ready in about 1.1 seconds, and the served `src/main.tsx` entry confirmed the app boot path was being transformed successfully.

fields.Summary: Validated the Corebound foundation task against explicit QA expectations and found the required behavior present: React/Vite/TypeScript scaffolding, fixed-timestep simulation, vehicle movement with collision and drilling logic, and targeted physics coverage. Verification commands passed, Vite reported ready in about 1.1 seconds, and the served `src/main.tsx` entry confirmed the app boot path was being transformed successfully.

entries.summary: Decomposed the 'Corebound Spec: First 15 Minutes' into 7 refined task cards. Merged specific pacing, tuning, and quality targets into the existing project plan to ensure the first playable build meets defined feel and readability bars.

fields.Summary: Decomposed the 'Corebound Spec: First 15 Minutes' into 7 refined task cards. Merged specific pacing, tuning, and quality targets into the existing project plan to ensure the first playable build meets defined feel and readability bars.
fields.Commands: read_file(agents/entrypoints/_manage.md), read_file(README.md), read_file(agents/outline.md), read_file(agents/work/tasksbacklog.md), read_file(agents/ideas/staging/corebound-spec-03-07-26-04.md), write_file(agents/work/tasksbacklog.md), run_shell_command(mv agents/ideas/staging/corebound-spec-03-07-26-04.md agents/ideas/specs/)
fields.Decisions: Overwrote the existing generic Corebound backlog cards with a more detailed set that incorporates the R1-R23 requirements from the new spec. This avoids duplication while providing the Builder with explicit implementation and tuning targets (e.g., fixed-timestep physics, specific drill timings, and economy affordability).

entries.title: Corebound first-session tuning spec
entries.summary: Wrote a follow-on Corebound spec that defines the first 15 minutes of play as a tuned, testable mining loop. Reused the existing greenfield and backlog context, but focused this run on first-session feel, pacing, onboarding, and upgrade payoff instead of duplicating the prior broad vertical-slice spec.

fields.Summary: Wrote a follow-on Corebound spec that defines the first 15 minutes of play as a tuned, testable mining loop. Reused the existing greenfield and backlog context, but focused this run on first-session feel, pacing, onboarding, and upgrade payoff instead of duplicating the prior broad vertical-slice spec.
fields.Commands: sed -n '1,240p' agents/entrypoints/_research.md; ls -1tr agents/ideas/inbox; sed -n '1,220p' agents/roles/analyze.md; sed -n '1,220p' agents/roles/articulate.md; sed -n '1,220p' agents/roles/historian.md; sed -n '1,220p' agents/roles/search.md; sed -n '1,260p' agents/ideas/inbox/corebound-prompt-03-07-26-03.md; sed -n '1,260p' agents/outline.md; sed -n '1,260p' agents/work/tasksbacklog.md; sed -n '1,260p' agents/work/tasksbackburner.md; sed -n '1,260p' agents/work/tasksarchive.md; rg --files corebound; rg -n "Corebound|corebound|Motherload|mining game" -S .; sed -n '1,260p' agents/work/task.md; sed -n '1,260p' agents/ideas/specs/corebound-spec-03-07-26-03.md; git -C corebound status --short --branch; find corebound -maxdepth 3 -type f | sort; cmp -s agents/ideas/inbox/corebound-prompt-03-07-26-03.md agents/ideas/processed/corebound-prompt-03-07-26-03.md; date '+%Y-%m-%d %H:%M'; mv -f agents/ideas/inbox/corebound-prompt-03-07-26-03.md agents/ideas/processed/corebound-prompt-03-07-26-03.md; web.search_query(site:store.steampowered.com Super Motherload Steam, site:store.steampowered.com Dome Keeper Steam, site:store.steampowered.com SteamWorld Dig Steam page)
fields.Decisions: Classified Corebound as greenfield in implementation terms because `corebound/` still contains no runnable game code, but treated the area as planning-established because the repo already has a vertical-slice spec and decomposed backlog. Wrote a first-session quality spec to complement that existing plan. Overwrote the processed prompt path because the inbox file matched an existing processed artifact byte-for-byte.

entries.title: Decomposed Corebound Vertical Slice Spec
entries.summary: Decomposed the 'Initial Browser Mining Vertical Slice' spec for Corebound into 7 executable task cards in the backlog.

fields.Summary: Decomposed the 'Initial Browser Mining Vertical Slice' spec for Corebound into 7 executable task cards in the backlog.
fields.Decisions: Followed the 3-8 card guidance, creating 7 cards to cover the full vertical slice from foundation to polish. Used a Vite + React + TypeScript stack for the web foundation as per standard project preferences.

entries.title: Corebound greenfield vertical slice spec
entries.summary: Wrote a greenfield spec for Corebound's first browser-based mining vertical slice after confirming the repo only contains initial scaffolding and no playable baseline. Used a narrow inspiration pass against official game pages to anchor the loop around mining, hazards, upgrades, and return-to-base progression.

fields.Summary: Wrote a greenfield spec for Corebound's first browser-based mining vertical slice after confirming the repo only contains initial scaffolding and no playable baseline. Used a narrow inspiration pass against official game pages to anchor the loop around mining, hazards, upgrades, and return-to-base progression.
fields.Commands: sed -n '1,240p' agents/entrypoints/_research.md; find agents/ideas/inbox -maxdepth 1 -type f -printf '%T@ %p\n' | sort -n; sed -n '1,220p' agents/roles/analyze.md; sed -n '1,220p' agents/roles/articulate.md; sed -n '1,220p' agents/roles/historian.md; sed -n '1,220p' agents/roles/search.md; sed -n '1,240p' agents/ideas/inbox/corebound-prompt-03-07-26-03.md; sed -n '1,240p' agents/outline.md; sed -n '1,240p' agents/work/tasksbacklog.md; sed -n '1,240p' agents/work/tasksbackburner.md; sed -n '1,240p' agents/work/tasksarchive.md; rg --files corebound | sed -n '1,260p'; find corebound -maxdepth 2 -type d | sort; find corebound -maxdepth 3 -type f | sort; git -C corebound status --short --branch; git -C corebound log --oneline --decorate -n 10; git -C corebound remote -v; sed -n '1,200p' corebound/LICENSE; find agents/ideas/staging -maxdepth 1 -type f | sort; find agents/ideas/processed -maxdepth 1 -type f | sort | tail -n 20; sed -n '1,200p' corebound/.gitignore; sed -n '1,260p' agents/ideas/staging/corebound-spec-03-07-26-03.md; date '+%Y-%m-%d %H:%M'; mv agents/ideas/inbox/corebound-prompt-03-07-26-03.md agents/ideas/processed/corebound-prompt-03-07-26-03.md; web.search_query(Super Motherload official game features steam, Dome Keeper official game features, SteamWorld Dig official game features, XGen Studios Motherload Goldium fuel hull cargo official)
fields.Decisions: Treated agents/ideas/inbox/.gitkeep as a placeholder rather than a prompt file. Classified Corebound as greenfield because the local repo contains only LICENSE, .gitignore, and git metadata. Used browsing because the prompt explicitly allowed it.
